hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in python/pytracingx/*.py|tests/*.py) ruff format "$f" && ruff check --fix "$f" ;; *) ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *README.md|*README.zh-CN.md) en_changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD -- README.md 2>/dev/null); zh_changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD -- README.zh-CN.md 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$en_changed" ] && [ -z "$zh_changed" ]; then echo "[reminder] README.md was modified — please also update README.zh-CN.md to keep them in sync." >&2; elif [ -z "$en_changed" ] && [ -n "$zh_changed" ]; then echo "[reminder] README.zh-CN.md was modified — please also update README.md to keep them in sync." >&2; fi ;; *) ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
